name: Beef Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Basic Red Sauce and Southwest Guacamole as per their respective recipes.
2. Cut the tortillas into 6 to 7-inch strips.
3. Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet until hot.
4. Cook the tortilla strips in oil for about 1 minute, then drain.
5. Cook and stir ground beef, chiles, and onion until the beef is brown.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Arrange the cooked tortilla strips at the bottom of a greased rectangular baking dish measuring 13 x 9 x 2-inches.
8. Top with the beef mixture, Basic Red Sauce, beans, and cheese.
9. Bake until hot and bubbly, about 25 to 30 minutes.
10. Serve with Southwest Guacamole and Sour Cream.
